stem: A SaaS analytics study surveys 200 subscribers and observes 13 positive outcomes out of 200 (6.5%). Estimate the true customer churn rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.065. Wilson 95% CI: [0.0384, 0.108]. Point estimate: 0.0732.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
